# FTRL — addendum (placeholder)

> **Placeholder.** Replace with the official PaperBench addendum, which
> contains author clarifications used by SimpleJudge during grading.

The upstream addendum typically narrows ambiguous parts of the paper, e.g.
which configuration files are canonical, which seeds and environment splits
are part of scope, and what counts as a successful execution log line.

Without the real addendum, our pipeline still runs end-to-end, but score
ceiling estimates and judge prompts will be approximations.
